title: Perturbation and stability of PAM50 subtyping in population-based primary invasive breast cancer
pam50_implementation: Parker centroids; nearest centroid; 100 reference-set repetitions and majority vote
normalization_and_centering: 100 balanced reference sets for gene centering
confidence_or_margin: Best and second-best averaged centroid correlations
discordance_definition: Subtype switching when original call appears in <=50% of perturbed classifications
missing_data: Complete cases; 6233 of prior 6660 early-stage cohort
data_availability: Open processed RNA-seq and clinical repository cited
code_availability: SRIQ code available; no complete executable pipeline
key_finding: Direct evidence that PAM50 calls and second-best labels respond to gene-content perturbation
limitations: Single regional cohort; bulk tissue; incomplete multiplicity and validation
nas_brca_002_relevance: Directly overlaps the proposed stability thesis
remaining_gap: Fixed single-sample reliability and external abstention validation remain unresolved

title: Machine learning for RNA sequencing-based intrinsic subtyping of breast cancer
cohort: TCGA-BRCA and SCAN-B/GSE96058 with additional reference and test sets
clinical_subtype_definition: Clinical groups used for interpretation; published PAM50 labels used as technical targets
pam50_implementation: Standard PAM50 and AWCA preprocessing-matched reference construction
normalization_and_centering: Reference cohorts matched to preprocessing; AWCA centering
confidence_or_margin: Classification probabilities and balanced performance metrics
stability_or_perturbation: Reference-cohort sensitivity and alternative reference construction
discordance_definition: Disagreement with published PAM50 technical labels
multiplicity: No study-wide framework for exploratory comparisons
code_availability: R code and trained classifiers published
key_finding: PAM50 calls materially depend on reference-cohort construction
limitations: No biological gold standard; possible cohort overlap; exploratory outcomes
remaining_gap: Independent fixed single-sample calibration and abstention remain unresolved

title: Genome-driven integrated classification of breast cancer validated in over 7,500 samples
pam50_implementation: IntClust compared with PAM50 and SCMGENE
external_validation: Large external cohort collection with applied coefficients
key_finding: Large-scale classifier transport study with direct PAM50 comparison
limitations: Heterogeneous cohorts and adaptable classifier; not a fixed PAM50 assay
remaining_gap: Modern fixed PAM50 reliability and patient-level abstention not tested

title: The molecular portraits of breast tumors are conserved across microarray platforms
cohort: Multi-institution training and historical validation cohorts
clinical_subtype_definition: Intrinsic molecular groups; clinical receptor context
pam50_implementation: Single-sample predictor derived from intrinsic centroids
internal_validation: Validation material contributed to centroid construction
external_validation: Historical external cohorts; not independent from all development choices
key_finding: Broad intrinsic patterns recur across platforms
limitations: Validation reuse; DWD cohort dependence; legacy platform
remaining_gap: Independent modern RNA-seq single-sample transport not established

title: Characterization of uncertainty in the classification of multivariate assays
cohort: Four archetypal FFPE specimens and GEICAM/9906 trial cohort
discordance_definition: Uncertain calls under simulated assay error
missing_data: Simulation rather than repeated patient measurements
internal_validation: Repeated laboratory replicates for four specimens
limitations: Error model from four specimens; simulated external uncertainty
remaining_gap: Empirical cross-laboratory calibration and prospective utility absent

title: PAM50 assay and the three-gene model for identifying molecular subtypes
cohort: Multiple retrospective microarray cohorts external to predictor development
clinical_subtype_definition: Major clinically relevant molecular subtype groupings
stability_or_perturbation: Sensitivity to classifier and preprocessing choices
key_finding: Moderate classifier agreement with different prognostic performance
limitations: No truth standard; heterogeneous data; patent and stock conflicts
nas_brca_002_relevance: Shows classifier choice can alter labels and associations
remaining_gap: Correct discordant label and fixed reliability layer unresolved

title: CrossLink: a novel method for cross-condition classification of cancer subtypes
cohort: TCGA-BRCA reference; UNC/GSE2740; GSE10797 subset; exploratory Arabic tumors
clinical_subtype_definition: ER/PR used as an indirect evaluation in one cross-platform subset
pam50_implementation: CrossLink class-specific cohort k-means compared with seven alternatives
normalization_and_centering: Common genes and cohort-level distribution matching
discordance_definition: Known labels where available; indirect ER/PR ISEP otherwise
external_validation: Cross-platform test only 20 cases without true PAM50 labels
key_finding: Recognizes cross-condition bias but cannot classify one patient independently
limitations: Cohort-composition dependence; 73% main accuracy; weak true-label validation
remaining_gap: Fixed patient-independent classifier with calibration remains unresolved

title: Prognostic potential of automated Ki67 evaluation in breast cancer
clinical_subtype_definition: St Gallen 2013 ER/PR/HER2 and Ki67 20% surrogate rule
expression_platform: FFPE IHC plus prior snap-frozen PAM50 RNA assay
pam50_implementation: Prior PAM50 calls used as comparator
normalization_and_centering: Twenty-two hotspot apps and global QuPath scoring
stability_or_perturbation: Hotspot definition and global-versus-hotspot Ki67 measurement
discordance_definition: IHC surrogate Luminal A/B versus PAM50 Luminal A/B
covariates: Multivariable Cox with reported clinicopathologic factors
data_availability: Supplementary materials; no located data statement
key_finding: Surrogate agreement was 55.8% hotspot and 66.3% global
limitations: Small subset; selected best hotspot; wide intervals; no truth standard
remaining_gap: No validated method for adjudicating patient-level discordance
